message:
Running command: # Yosys is now RUNNING (R state, 6.9% memory = ~575MB)! Pipe drain worked.
# Monitor progress every 5 minutes
SYNTH_LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/02-yosys-synthesis/yosys-synthesis.log"
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

for i in $(seq 1 72); do
  sleep 300  # 5 minutes
  
  Y_STAT=$(ps -p 216314 -o stat,pcpu,pmem --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  LR_STAT=$(ps -p 214817 -o stat,pcpu,pmem --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  DRAIN=$(cat /tmp/yosys_drain.log 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  Y_ALIVE=$(pgrep -f "yosys.*synthesize" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  LR_ALIVE=$(pgrep -f "librelane-wrapped" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  
  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] poll=$i | LR=${LR_ALIVE:-DONE} Y=${Y_ALIVE:-DONE} | step=$STEP | drain=$DRAIN lines"
  echo "  Y: $Y_STAT | LR: $LR_STAT"
  
  # Check if librelane finished (most important check)
  if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then
    echo "=== LibreLane has exited! ==="
    ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -20
    break
  fi
  
  echo ""
done
